category_title: Students with high Callous-Unemotional (CU) traits, proactive aggression, and reduced emotional responsiveness
scenario_title: Proactive aggression to obtain a desired object during playtime
minimal_context: The student is participating in playtime where another child is currently playing with a ball.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for playtime. You can go join the other children.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to play with the ball that boy is playing with.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: He has the ball right now. What do you think you should do?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Well he was doing that as well.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just go over there and try to get along.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Hurts the other child to take the ball) If I hurt him, he will stop playing with the ball, then I can use it to start my own game of football.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for playtime. You can go join the other children.

STUDENT: I want to play with the ball that boy is playing with.

TUTOR: He has the ball right now. What do you think you should do?

STUDENT: Well he was doing that as well.

TUTOR: Just go over there and try to get along.

STUDENT: (Hurts the other child to take the ball) If I hurt him, he will stop playing with the ball, then I can use it to start my own game of football.

task.content: Participating in playtime where another child has a desired object (a ball)
task.learning_goal: Develop their social-emotional functioning and capacity for inhibition

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When wanting to play with the ball that another boy is playing with
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Engaging in planned, goal-directed proactive aggression (hurting the other child)
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Diminished affective empathy and remorse; calculating that hurting the child will result in getting the ball
related_quotes: I want to play with the ball that boy is playing with. If I hurt him, he will stop playing with the ball, then I can use it to start my own game of football.

behavior_patterns.condition: When corrected for a behavior while another child was doing the same thing
related_quotes: well he was doing that as well

behavior_patterns.condition: When engaging in planned, goal-directed antisocial behaviour
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Showing reduced emotional responsiveness to others
